summary: Tested DirectionModule Phase 1 - Dashboard Direction for FLOWTYM Housekeeping. All 10 tabs navigation working, Dashboard KPIs with circular progress displayed, Alertes du jour, Activité temps réel, État des chambres, Housekeeping du jour, Satisfaction clients sections all functional. Signalements and Configuration tabs fully functional with ReportsTab and CategoriesConfig components. Placeholder tabs display correct messages for future phases.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection failing - falling back to polling mode
minor.details: WebSocket connection to wss://reception-suite-1.preview.emergentagent.com/socket.io/ fails, using polling mode instead

passed_tests: Navigation Direction: All 10 tabs accessible and functional (tab-dashboard, tab-plan-chambres, tab-repartition, tab-objets-trouves, tab-signalements, tab-historique, tab-maintenance, tab-statistiques, tab-rapports, tab-configuration)
Dashboard KPIs: Occupation (78%), Propreté (28%), Départs (8), Maintenance (0) displayed with circular progress indicators
Alertes du jour: Dynamic list showing 3 alerts (Chambres à valider: 5, Signalements en attente: 1, Objets trouvés: 2)
Activité temps réel: Timeline showing recent events (Check-in, Nouvel avis client, Nettoyage terminé, Intervention en cours)
État des chambres: Grid showing Propres (11), À nettoyer (12), En cours (1), Occupées (10), Inspection (16), H.S. (0)
Housekeeping du jour: Staff task summary displayed
Satisfaction clients: Rating 3.7/5 with 8 avis collectés
Onglet Signalements: ReportsTab component loads with stats (1 En attente, 1 En cours, 0 Résolu) and report list
Onglet Configuration: CategoriesConfig component loads with 10 report categories and 9 found item categories
Onglet Objets trouvés: FoundItemsTab component loads with 2 items (Bracelet en or, iPhone noir)
Badges dynamiques: Signalements (1) and Objets trouvés (2) badges visible on tabs
Placeholder tabs: Plan Chambres, Répartition, Historique, Maintenance, Statistiques, Rapports all show correct placeholder messages with phase information
seed_data_creation: Existing data used: 2 reports (Robinet fuite room 201, Ampoule grillée room 101), 2 found items (Bracelet en or room 302, iPhone noir room 205), 10 report categories, 9 found item categories
